title: सम्पर्क
content:
Preeti to Unicode - The Preeti to Unicode Converter is a widely recognized and efficient tool that is specifically created to convert traditional Nepali Preeti fonts into Unicode. Usually, when we use the Preeti font in Microsoft Word to type in Preeti, it cannot be used on the internet because it needs a Unicode Nepali Font. With our Preeti to Unicode converter tool mentioned above, you can convert the text into Unicode Nepali. After the conversion, you can use the text anywhere on the internet or in various mobile and desktop applications.
